meaning: adj.(黄油等) 容易被涂开的
examples: CONCLUSION The optimum formulation is of moderate viscosity with good spreadable and humectant properties.
If I were stuck on a desert island, the jar I'd treasure is Adams Organic, which has a pure roasted-peanut flavor and a spreadable but thick texture.
The place where old-school BBC rules about "sticky-backed plastic" and "a proprietary brand of spreadable yeast extract" still obtain to a ludicrous extent.
This is a surge that is spreadable across media, demographic and physical geographies, and consumable goods.
An entire chapter of Spreadable Media looks at independent creators building new models around online circulation.
